description: Explore how to replace the current `node:readline/promises` wizard in `fabric init` with `@clack/prompts` while preserving the existing plan/executor boundary and TTY bypass semantics.
focus: @clack/prompts adapter surface, prompt lifecycle, cancellation handling, TTY assumptions
findings: Current wizard lives in packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts via createDefaultInitWizardAdapter() and promptYesNo/promptSelect helpers. Replacement should stay inside the adapter seam and avoid touching plan/executor contracts.

description: Explore which init tests assert wizard semantics, CLI surface, or i18n snapshots so the @clack/prompts migration can preserve behavior without overfitting to implementation details.
focus: wizard tests, CLI-surface tests, i18n snapshots, prompt bypass expectations
findings: Current direct coverage lives in init-wizard.test.ts and init-cli-surface.test.ts, with indirect output coverage in init-mcp-scope.test.ts and i18n.test.ts. The migration should keep plan-only/reapply tests stable and may need a mockable prompt adapter seam.
